parameters.text: Identify the vegetable in this image. Only return the vegetable name.

parameters.content:
## Webhook
Receives input from the user. Acts as the trigger for workflow execution

## AI Processing
Identifies and extracts relevant information from input. Converts raw input into usable data

## Data Preparation
Cleans and structures the extracted data. Prepares it for API consumption

## External API Call
Fetches relevant data from external service. Uses processed input to retrieve results

## Data Merge
Combines AI output and API response. Creates a unified dataset for further processing

## Logic Processing
Applies custom logic and transformations and Formats final output

## Response
Sends processed result back to user. Completes the workflow
